title: pedicularis albolabiata
intro: Pedicularis albolabiata is a flowering plant species in the balsam family, native to the mountainous regions of China. Traditionally, Pedicularis albolabiata has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Pedicularis albolabiata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
